overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating a futuristic neon-lit city. The character crosses busy streets, walks past a large military vehicle, explores a flooded underground alley, and ascends industrial stairs back to street level. The environment features dense cyberpunk architecture with neon signage, industrial piping, and reflective water surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: black sports car drives through the intersection from right to left
character steps onto the yellow crosswalk and begins crossing the street
yellow utility truck passes by on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a broad yellow-striped crosswalk in a busy cyberpunk district, heading toward an industrial structure

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection ahead of the character
two pedestrians walking parallel to the character in the crosswalk

entered.detail: purple neon sign reading HOTEL with Japanese characters on a green building facade
tall building with large colorful animated advertisement showing a character
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing covering the street
large white industrial ventilation fan visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a busy cyberpunk intersection with clear skies and bright sunlight. Neon signs and digital billboards cover the buildings. The character crosses a wide yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles pass by, heading toward a large industrial fan structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to parked military vehicle and storefronts

events.description: large military truck temporarily blocks the left side of the view
moving from open sidewalk into a narrower alleyway with reduced sky visibility
turning right to enter a narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking along a sidewalk beside a large military truck, passing various pedestrians and entering a narrow alley

notable_agents.action: large gray military transport truck parked along the curb
pedestrian with red hair and white jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: blue and white vending machine on the sidewalk corner
purple neon sign for a bar with Japanese characters above a doorway
low concrete railings separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk next to a massive parked military truck, passing pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character turns into a narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls, moving away from the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered corridor leading to flooded underground chamber

events.description: entering a dark narrow corridor with fluorescent lighting and graffiti-covered walls
descending into a flooded underground area with water covering the ground
shifting from artificial corridor lights to dim underground lighting with colorful neon reflections on water

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow graffiti-covered corridor and descending into a flooded underground area with reflective water surfaces

entered.detail: walls covered in colorful graffiti tags, street art, and spray-painted text
water-covered floor reflecting neon lights and building facades from above
large metal pipes running along the walls and ceiling
blue plastic barrels and trash bags stacked against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow corridor with walls covered in graffiti and fluorescent lighting. The ground transitions to water as the character descends into a flooded underground chamber, with neon lights from above creating colorful reflections on the water surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical industrial shaft with maintenance stairs between buildings

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal towering building facades with exposed industrial systems
ascending rusted metal stairs toward street level
exiting the enclosed stairwell back to open street level with natural lighting

agents.ego_description: looking up at towering cyberpunk architecture with industrial piping, then climbing metal stairs to exit back to street level

notable_agents.action: white van parked on the street near the stairwell exit

entered.detail: rusted orange metal stairs with railings leading upward
tall narrow gap between buildings with exposed HVAC systems and piping
dense array of air conditioning units and ventilation pipes on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character looks up through a narrow vertical shaft between towering buildings, revealing dense industrial HVAC systems and piping. The character then ascends a rusted metal staircase, transitioning from the dark underground back to street level where natural sunlight and a parked white van become visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open city intersection down into a dark, flooded subterranean corridor before ascending back to the surface. It begins with the character crossing a wide, yellow-striped crosswalk under clear sunlight and towering digital billboards, moving toward a distant industrial fan. As the character passes a massive parked military truck and neon storefronts, the open street narrows into a graffiti-covered alleyway. The scene then shifts deeper into a dark corridor where the ground gives way to a flooded underground chamber, filling the space with colorful neon reflections on the water's surface. Finally, the camera looks up through a vertical shaft of industrial piping and HVAC systems as the character climbs a rusted metal staircase, emerging from the shadows back into the natural sunlight of the street level beside a parked white van.
